title: Helck the Hero
overview: The Demon Lord is defeated by a human hero. To find his replacement, the demonkin hold a competition. Helck, a human and mortal enemy, is among the participants.

title: Anne From Management
overview: Helck continues to rack up victories as a fan favorite of the crowd. He then proceeds on to the semifinal race! Will he be able to keep up with the other racers?

title: The Unknown Enemy
overview: Helck displays mind-blowing strength and leaves Vermilio increasingly concerned about the threat he poses.

title: Shock
overview: After Helck blocks an attack meant for Edil, Vermilio becomes convinced that he is an enemy. But then, the floor gives away and everyone falls into a dark underground room...

title: The Remote Island Village
overview: The mysterious power of the gate sends Vermilio and Helck to an unknown remote island. Vermilio travels deeper into the island and comes across a fluffy creature.

title: Invasion
overview: Vermilio poses a question to Helck: “Can you fight against your old friends?” Meanwhile, the others at Castle Urum are fighting an overwhelming number of winged knights.

title: The Human King
overview: Hyura and the others escape Castle Urum but soon find themselves surrounded again. Azudra arrives to subdue the winged knights. All the while, Azudra begins plotting.

title: Back to the Continent
overview: Azudra determines the winged knights are a major threat. Meanwhile, Helck and Vermilio take it easy.

title: Barbarians of the Tothman Tribe
overview: Helck and Vermilio bid farewell to the mysterious island and its residents as they sail away with a stowaway Piwi aboard. However, they run into a massive whirlpool!

title: In Pursuit of a Map
overview: Helck and company end up in the Erille Kingdom where they must fight the barbarians of the Tothman Tribe. The Tothman King goes berserk after tapping into a mysterious power.

title: The Troubadour's Song
overview: Helck and company use their winnings from the cooking competition to buy a map leading to the Empire. They make plans to go northwest into the ruins of two destroyed kingdoms.

title: The Spirit of Faith
overview: Vermilio is frightened by Helck's power as he goes berserk during his battle with Augis. It makes her recall the words of the Great Witch, who warned her about Helck.

title: With Younger Brother in Tow
overview: When they were little, Helck and his younger brother Cless lost both of their parents. One day, Cless gets very sick and Helck begs for someone to save him.

title: The Mercenaries
overview: Only half a month after Cless departs on his expedition, monsters begin to appear in greater numbers than ever before. The kingdom enacts a military draft to combat them.

title: The Power of Heroes
overview: Helck arrives at the Demon Lord’s castle and senses a powerful presence. It turns out to be Azudra of the Four Elite Lords, who makes a plea for peace.

title: The Truth Behind Awakening
overview: Zeruzeon reveals the kingdom’s terrifying plan, so Helck and his friends sneak into the castle to put a stop to it by saving Cless.

title: Traitors
overview: Helck is on the verge of being killed. To save the life of his big brother, Cless is forced to make a choice.

title: Smile
overview: Helck charges onward but an army of bounty hunters stands between him and Alicia. She is in horrible shape as she faces public execution.

title: Vermilio of the Four Elite Lords
overview: Helck's motivations become clear with an awakening of a horrific truth. Vermilio vows to fight by Helck’s side.

title: The Mysterious Woman
overview: The winged knights continue attacking Castle Thor to level themselves up further. Meanwhile, Asta keeps snooping for information in the human realm.

title: Phase 2
overview: Zeruzeon leads the winged knights in an assault on the newly rebuilt castle. Humans and demons become locked in combat.

title: Spell Breaker
overview: Hyura and Edil battle it out at Castle Thor while a strange relationship starts between them. Meanwhile, Mikaros is confronted by Azudra and reveals a past grudge.

title: The Chosen Path
overview: Raphaed’s army attacks a demonkin outpost, when Helck and Vermilio arrive. Raphaed determines Vermilio is Helck's newfound source of support.

title: Towards a Hopeful Future
overview: Helck faces off with his former friend, Alicia. Meanwhile, Vermilio can't help but be concerned about Helck as she continues to fight with Raphaed.
